response.justification: Bogdan has over 10 years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker) and deep exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms (AWS), testing (Vitest/Jest), and architecture — plus proven ownership of open-source tools and cross-stack problem-solving. His resume exceeds the 6-year requirement and demonstrates exceptional technical breadth and initiative.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Docker across multiple enterprises
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflow tooling, directly matching a key requirement
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development demonstrating initiative and deep technical craftsmanship
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though equivalent frameworks (Node.js, testing tools) are present
German language proficiency is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise team
Some roles lack clear metrics or impact statements, making it harder to gauge scale of contributions
